task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and extract just the bucket name
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS Lambda function with basic properties including function name, runtime, and role ARN
Write a Python function that takes an AWS IAM policy document (as a dictionary) and returns a list of all the actions (Action field values) granted in the policy
